description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the public.ecr.aws/docker/library/node:22-trixie Docker image with the tag saas-linux-small-arm64 and caches the directories src/node_modules/ and src/kakugen.json. Define a single stage named test. In the test stage add a test_skill job that runs the shell commands scripts/kakugen.sh, then cd src, then npm install, then npm test. The job has no additional artifacts or rules and runs on every pipeline.
